title: Chapter 690
content:
Chapter 690: The Chapter that Never Was!Note from Deathblade: Er Gen actually made a mistake when posting his chapters, and skipped from 689 directly to 691. I guess that means ISSTH is technically 1613 chapters long, not 1614!!
